_comment: Team -> player draft mapping. Keys are team names exactly as in pots.json (matched to team IDs at scoring time). Players: Drew, Eriku, Rain, Andy, Dev, Gav, Rea. 42 of 48 teams drafted (6 each); undrafted: Cape Verde, Curacao, Iran, Iraq, South Africa, Tunisia. 'manualOverrides' forces a team's furthest stage if the API ever mislabels something: key = team id or name, value = GROUP_STAGE | LAST_32 | LAST_16 | QUARTER_FINALS | SEMI_FINALS | FINAL | CHAMPION.
